# Run Delegate Versions

**API Collection**

The version of the run delegate.

## Overview

Set the version field of the [doc://com.apple.coretext/documentation/CoreText/CTRunDelegateCallbacks] structure to `kCTRunDelegateCurrentVersion` when creating a CTRunDelegate object with a call to [doc://com.apple.coretext/documentation/CoreText/CTRunDelegateCreate(_:_:)].

## Constants

- **kCTRunDelegateVersion1**: Version 1 of the run delegate.
- **kCTRunDelegateCurrentVersion**: The current version of the run delegate.
